base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of full_text_palette_by_zone — a ui (typography) from 1985 super mario bros. Documentation block — 'ABC 123' sample text rendered in all 6 zone palettes (Overworld / Underground / Castle / Underwater / Mushrooms / Snow) per emulator (Nestopia + FCEUX). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Documentation block — 'ABC 123' sample text rendered in all 6 zone palettes (Overworld / Underground / Castle / Underwater / Mushrooms / Snow) per emulator (Nestopia + FCEUX); shows how the same font atlas renders differently per zone
